de.uka.ilkd.key.logic

Class DefaultVisitor

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.DefaultVisitor
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Visitor
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    BoundVarsVisitor, ClashFreeSubst.VariableCollectVisitor, FocusIsSubFormulaOfInfFlowContractAppFeature.SubFormulaVisitor, InfFlowInputOutputRelationSnippet.SearchVisitor, OpCollector, SortCollector, SVNameCorrespondenceCollector, SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil.ContainsIrrelevantThingsVisitor, SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil.ContainsModalityOrQueryVisitor, SymbolicExecutionUtil.FindModalityWithSymbolicExecutionLabelId, SyntacticalReplaceVisitor, TacletSchemaVariableCollector, TacletVisitor, TermProgramVariableCollector

    public abstract class DefaultVisitor
extends Object
implements Visitor
    This abstract Vistor class declares the interface for a common term visitor.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void subtreeEntered(Term subtreeRoot)
      this method is called in execPreOrder and execPostOrder in class Term when entering the subtree rooted in the term subtreeRoot.
      void subtreeLeft(Term subtreeRoot)
      this method is called in execPreOrder and execPostOrder in class Term when leaving the subtree rooted in the term subtreeRoot.
      boolean visitSubtree(Term visited)
      Checks if the subtree below the visited Term should be traversed.

        public DefaultVisitor()

    • Method Detail

      • visitSubtree

        public boolean visitSubtree(Term visited)
        Description copied from interface: Visitor
        Checks if the subtree below the visited Term should be traversed.
        Specified by:
        visitSubtree in interface Visitor
        Parameters:
        visited - The currently visited Term.
        Returns:
        true visit sub tree, false skip sub tree.

      • subtreeEntered

        public void subtreeEntered(Term subtreeRoot)
        Description copied from interface: Visitor
        this method is called in execPreOrder and execPostOrder in class Term when entering the subtree rooted in the term subtreeRoot. Default implementation is to do nothing. Subclasses can override this method when the visitor behaviour depends on informations bound to subtrees.
        Specified by:
        subtreeEntered in interface Visitor
        Parameters:
        subtreeRoot - root of the subtree which the visitor enters.

      • subtreeLeft

        public void subtreeLeft(Term subtreeRoot)
        Description copied from interface: Visitor
        this method is called in execPreOrder and execPostOrder in class Term when leaving the subtree rooted in the term subtreeRoot. Default implementation is to do nothing. Subclasses can override this method when the visitor behaviour depends on informations bound to subtrees.
        Specified by:
        subtreeLeft in interface Visitor
        Parameters:
        subtreeRoot - root of the subtree which the visitor leaves.
